response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance segment 00:00-02:04. 2. Identified the song title as '罪と罰' (Tsumi to Batsu) via on-screen text. 3. Researched '罪と罰' and confirmed the original artist/composer is Ringo Sheena. 4. Searched for original lyrics for '罪と罰'. 5. Formatted the lyrics for the JSON output, including escaping quotes. 6. Identified the remainder of the video (02:04-04:30) as a talk segment without vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video performance featuring Mori Calliope and guest Shuto performing a cover of "Tsumi to Batsu" (originally by Ringo Sheena), followed by a talk and introduction segment.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and Shuto perform a cover of the song "Tsumi to Batsu". The stage features a blue crystal aesthetic.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
頬を刺す朝の山手通り煙草の空き箱を捨てる今日もまた足の踏み場は無い小部屋が孤独を甘やかす
"不穏な悲鳴を愛さないで未来等 見ないで確信出来る 現在(いま)だけ 重ねてあたしの名前をちゃんと呼んで身体を触って必要なのは 是だけ 認めて"
愛している−独り泣き喚いて夜道を弄れど虚しい改札の安蛍光燈は貴方の影すら落さない
歪んだ無常の遠き日もセヴンスターの香り味わう如く季節を呼び起こす
あたしが望んだこと自体矛盾を優に超えて一番愛しいあなたの声迄掠れさせて居たのだろう
静寂を破るドイツ車とパトカーサイレン 爆音現実界 或る浮遊
"不穏な悲鳴を愛さないで未来等 見ないで確信出来る現在だけ重ねてあたしの名前をちゃんと呼んで身体を触って必要なのは是だけ認めて"
"不穏な悲鳴を愛さないで確信出来る 現在だけ 重ねてあたしの名前をちゃんと呼んで身体を触って必要なのは是だけ認めて"
頬を刺す朝の山手通り煙草の空き箱を捨てる今日もまた足の踏み場は無い小部屋が孤独を甘やかす
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The Yamanote street morning pricks my cheeks, I throw away an empty cigarette box.
Again today, there is no room for my feet, the small room spoils my loneliness.
"Don't love the unsettling screams, don't look at the future, layer only the present that I can be sure of, call my name properly, touch my body, all that is needed is this, admit it."
I love you - I cry out alone, even if I fumble along the night road, it is empty.
The cheap fluorescent light at the ticket gate doesn't even cast your shadow.
Even those distant days of distorted impermanence evoke the season, just like tasting the scent of Seven Stars.
What I wanted itself, easily exceeding contradiction, I wonder if I made even your voice, the one I love the most, go hoarse.
German car and police car siren breaking the silence, explosive sound, reality, a certain levitation.
"Don't love the unsettling screams, don't look at the future, layer only the present that I can be sure of, call my name properly, touch my body, all that is needed is this, admit it."
"Don't love the unsettling screams, layer only the present that I can be sure of, call my name properly, touch my body, all that is needed is this, admit it."
The Yamanote street morning pricks my cheeks, I throw away an empty cigarette box.
Again today, there is no room for my feet, the small room spoils my loneliness.

scenes.description: Post-performance talk segment between Mori Calliope and Shuto.
